name: Apple
description: A sweet red fruit, or perhaps tarte when green

name: Banana
description: A yellow, elongated edible fruit also found in bloons TD

name: Cherry
description: A small rounded fruit, with a pit

name: Peach

name: Date
description: A sweet fruit from the date palm, often enjoyed dried

name: Blueberry
